productDisplayName: Fila Men's Turbo Black Navy Shoe
description: A shoe made for motor Sports enthusiasts, the fila Turbo is as high on style as on function. Inspired by fast cars, with an aerodynamic design and a sleek finish, this is the pair that belongs to your collection. Team them with skinny jeans and a funky t-shirt to look stunningUpper Synthetic upper for longer shoe life and easy maintenance Horizontal elevated ridges on the sides for an aerodynamic structure Reinforced toe guard Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded tongue and plushly padded collar for in-step comfort Rubber heel counter embedded into the upper for enhanced shoe durability Perforations around the toe box for ventilation Brand name on lateral side and tongue for a more attractive look Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for better shock absorption Soft cushy footbed for extra comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole TPR outsole with tire tread pattern for durability and better traction Shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
